description_long: This is a modern grave monument composed of a rectangular, light gray stone base with a slightly raised black stone slab at the head. At the head of the grave, a tall, black vertical headstone rises, featuring a prominent white Latin cross engraved or inlaid on the left side. The headstone is asymmetrical, with the cross section extending higher than the rest. The grave's surface is smooth and flat, suitable for placing flowers or memorial items. The materials appear to be polished granite or marble, giving the monument a dignified and durable appearance. There are no visible inscriptions or epitaphs, only the cross as a symbolic element.
description: A modern grave monument with a light gray stone base, a black headstone featuring a white cross, and a smooth, polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the grave, the black headstone with a white cross, and the smooth gray stone base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the layered structure of the grave's base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black headstone without visible inscriptions and the rectangular base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstone and the flat, expansive grave surface.
